Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.name: MIMIC-IV
Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.desc: Comprehensive critical care dataset containing de-identified health records of ICU patients (2008–2019).

Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.name: eICU Collaborative Research Database
Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.desc: Multi-center critical care dataset of clinical data from over 200,000 ICU stays.

Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.name: All of Us (NIH)
Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.desc: Diverse EHR & genomics dataset focusing on underrepresented populations.

Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.name: HCUP (U.S. Hospitalization Data)
Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.desc: Nationwide inpatient & emergency data for healthcare utilization and cost analysis.

Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.name: PSG-IPA (PolySomnoGraphic Inter-scorer Performance Assessment)
Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.desc: Polysomnography database with expert annotations for sleep and cognitive impairment assessment. v1.0.0 (2026).

Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.name: MIMIC-III-Ext-Notes
Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.desc: Extended clinical notes from MIMIC-III critical care database. v1.0.0 (2026).

Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.name: MIMIC-III-Ext-PPG
Clinical & Electronic Health Records (EH.desc: PPG (photoplethysmography) benchmark dataset for cardiorespiratory analysis from MIMIC-III. v1.0.0 (2026).

Chest & Lungs.name: NIH Chest X-ray (ChestXray-NIHCC)
Chest & Lungs.desc: ~112,000 chest X-ray images for pneumonia detection and multi-label disease classification.

Chest & Lungs.name: CheXpert (Stanford)
Chest & Lungs.desc: ~224,000 chest X-rays for weak supervision and uncertainty-aware classification.

Chest & Lungs.name: CheXpert Plus
Chest & Lungs.desc: 223,462 unique pairs of radiology reports and chest X-rays.

Chest & Lungs.name: LIDC-IDRI
Chest & Lungs.desc: Lung CT scans focusing on pulmonary nodules.

Chest & Lungs.name: COVID-19 Radiography Database
Chest & Lungs.desc: Chest X-ray images for COVID-19 and pneumonia detection.

Brain & Neurology.name: OASIS Brain MRI
Brain & Neurology.desc: Brain MRI for healthy aging & Alzheimer’s disease analysis.

Brain & Neurology.name: OpenNeuro
Brain & Neurology.desc: Free, open platform for sharing and accessing neuroimaging datasets (fMRI, EEG, MEG).

Brain & Neurology.name: Human Connectome Project (HCP)
Brain & Neurology.desc: High-resolution neuroimaging datasets to map human brain connections.

Brain & Neurology.name: ADNI (Alzheimer’s Disease Neuroimaging Initiative)
Brain & Neurology.desc: Longitudinal multisite study for early detection of Alzheimer's.

Oncology & Dermatology.name: TCIA (The Cancer Imaging Archive)
Oncology & Dermatology.desc: CT, MRI, PET images covering multiple cancer types.

Oncology & Dermatology.name: HAM10000
Oncology & Dermatology.desc: ~10,000 dermoscopy images for melanoma detection and skin lesion classification.

Oncology & Dermatology.name: DDI (Diverse Dermatology Images)
Oncology & Dermatology.desc: Deeply curated, pathologically confirmed image dataset with diverse skin tones.

Other Imaging.name: EchoNet-Dynamic
Other Imaging.desc: 10,030 labeled echocardiogram videos and human expert annotations.

Other Imaging.name: MRNet (Knee MRIs)
Other Imaging.desc: 1,370 knee MRI exams performed at Stanford.

Other Imaging.name: MURA (MSK X-rays)
Other Imaging.desc: Musculoskeletal radiographs containing 40,561 images from 14,863 studies.

Other Imaging.name: MultiCaRe
Other Imaging.desc: Multimodal clinical case dataset with 70k+ case reports and 130k+ labeled images from oncology, cardiology, surgery, and pathology. Open-access PMC article cases (2026).

Genomics & Bioinformatics.name: The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA)
Genomics & Bioinformatics.desc: Genomic, epigenomic, transcriptomic, and proteomic data across 33 cancer types.

Genomics & Bioinformatics.name: UK Biobank
Genomics & Bioinformatics.desc: In-depth genetic and health information from ~500,000 volunteer participants.

Genomics & Bioinformatics.name: 1000 Genomes Project
Genomics & Bioinformatics.desc: Whole-genome sequencing for population genetics and variant analysis.

Genomics & Bioinformatics.name: gnomAD
Genomics & Bioinformatics.desc: Large-scale variant database with 140,000+ exomes & genomes.

Physiological Signals & Wearables.name: PhysioNet
Physiological Signals & Wearables.desc: Renowned repository of physiological signals and open medical data.

Physiological Signals & Wearables.name: PTB-XL ECG Dataset
Physiological Signals & Wearables.desc: Large-scale 12-lead ECG dataset with 21,000+ recordings for arrhythmia detection.

Physiological Signals & Wearables.name: MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database
Physiological Signals & Wearables.desc: Standard test material for evaluation of arrhythmia detectors.

Physiological Signals & Wearables.name: NSRR Sleep Datasets
Physiological Signals & Wearables.desc: Polysomnography & sleep signals for sleep disorder detection.

Physiological Signals & Wearables.name: GRABMyoFlow
Physiological Signals & Wearables.desc: sEMG (surface electromyography) dataset with 63 subjects and dynamic transitions for hand gesture recognition and biometric authentication (2026).

Physiological Signals & Wearables.name: Gait & Brain-Muscle Activity
Physiological Signals & Wearables.desc: Multi-modal gait recordings combining brain activity (EEG), muscle EMG, body kinematics, and ground reaction forces during treadmill walking at varying speeds (2026).

Physiological Signals & Wearables.name: Endometriosis Symptoms Monitoring Database
Physiological Signals & Wearables.desc: Daily symptom tracking from 34 endometriosis patients over 1-10 months, including symptom frequency, intensity, and MedDRA coding (2026).

Physiological Signals & Wearables.name: Bridge2AI-Voice Pediatric Dataset
Physiological Signals & Wearables.desc: Pediatric voice recordings for speech analysis and voice disorder detection (v1.0.0, 2026).

Medical NLP & Text.name: CORD-19
Medical NLP & Text.desc: Scientific literature corpus with 1M+ COVID-19 research papers.

Medical NLP & Text.name: BioASQ
Medical NLP & Text.desc: Biomedical question answering and semantic indexing dataset.

Medical NLP & Text.name: Medical Transcriptions
Medical NLP & Text.desc: Medical transcription data for NLP tasks.

Medical NLP & Text.name: Augmented Clinical Notes (Asclepius)
Medical NLP & Text.desc: 167k synthetic clinical notes with discharge summaries and comprehensive medical histories (HuggingFace, 2026).

Medical NLP & Text.name: Med_Dataset
Medical NLP & Text.desc: 100k real doctor-patient interactions across medical specialties, including diagnoses and treatment recommendations (HuggingFace, 2026).

Medical NLP & Text.name: MedMCQA
Medical NLP & Text.desc: 194k+ medical entrance exam MCQs covering 21 subjects and 2.4k healthcare topics. High-quality AIIMS & NEET PG questions (HuggingFace, 2026).

Medical NLP & Text.name: Medical Medicine Dataset
Medical NLP & Text.desc: Comprehensive drug information: 700 medications with therapeutic uses, side effects, and descriptions for medical chatbots and clinical decision support (HuggingFace, 2026).

Medical NLP & Text.name: MedFit Dataset
Medical NLP & Text.desc: 6,444 healthcare Q&A pairs designed for fine-tuning medical chatbot language models (HuggingFace, 2026).

Clinical Cases & Multimodal Data.name: CNTXTAI Medical Case Studies
Clinical Cases & Multimodal Data.desc: Diverse clinical cases from chronic diseases (MS, diabetes complications) to acute conditions (heart disease, respiratory failure) from academic publications (HuggingFace, 2026).

Emergency & Synthetic Healthcare Data.name: Synthetic Emergency Healthcare Services Dataset
Emergency & Synthetic Healthcare Data.desc: Synthetic simulation data of emergency services including blood pressure records, patient types, and outpatient department data (Zenodo, 2026).

Emergency & Synthetic Healthcare Data.name: Hindi, English and Punjabi Healthcare Datasets
Emergency & Synthetic Healthcare Data.desc: Multilingual healthcare datasets covering medical diagnoses, disease names and health information in three languages (Zenodo, 2026).

Epidemiology & General Health.name: Pima Indians Diabetes Dataset
Epidemiology & General Health.desc: Tabular clinical data for diabetes risk prediction.

Epidemiology & General Health.name: Global Health Observatory (WHO)
Epidemiology & General Health.desc: WHO's gateway to health-related statistics for its 194 Member States.

Epidemiology & General Health.name: Global Health Data Exchange (GHDx)
Epidemiology & General Health.desc: Comprehensive catalog of surveys, censuses, vital statistics, and other health-related data.
